name: knowledge-graph-extractor
desc: Turn any document or a whole zip into an interactive knowledge graph, using a self-hosted Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP on a single NVIDIA L4
descFull: Turn any document or a whole zip into an interactive knowledge graph, using a self-hosted Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-MTP on a single NVIDIA L4
